# Handoff: implementation -> qa

<!-- HANDOFF_META: START -->
from: implementation
to: qa
iteration: 1
<!-- HANDOFF_META: END -->

## Tasks

- [ ] Verify the main success path end to end.
- [ ] Validate the expected failure cases and guardrails.
- [ ] Capture any sign-off notes or remaining follow-ups.

## Context

QA should focus on behavior that changed in the implementation stage and confirm the published contract still holds.

## Acceptance

- The targeted regression checks pass.
- No new blockers are introduced.
- Any unresolved issues are clearly documented.
